name: zweapon_init
description: zWepInit resets OptCatalog weapon runtime globals, restores weapon defaults, and conditionally registers the Weapons ZAR handler.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare currently fails for zWepInit: 68 unmasked mismatches after masking 92 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 163 bytes and the VC object body is 176 bytes with 15 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.

The reviewed byte drift is global store ordering and source-shape drift around OptCatalog reset and conditional ZAR handler registration; the native smoke verifies runtime reset defaults, Weapons ZAR handler registration, and skip behavior when registration is disabled.
